acceptance_requirements.requirement: At least one macro rule family reaches Phase -1 through Phase 4.
Claim extraction gold set passes the manual gate.
Data availability matrix covers the first production candidate proxies.
Validation v2 reports effective N, overlap, multiple testing, and costs.
Runtime rule aggregation implements correlated-rule de-dup and conflict objects.
Confidence policy v1 implements the min-components safe function.
Research-only no-trade rule is enforced by checker.
Patch validator rejects forbidden paths and inconsistent target paths.
Paper trading monitor outputs live-vs-baseline differences.
Production monitor detects alpha decay and calibration drift.
Compliance gate blocks unauthorized reports from production runtime.
Audit viewer traces source to claim to hypothesis to rule to parameter to experiment to patch to agent output.

blockers: source license review still pending or restricted

criteria.description: At least one macro rule family reaches the Phase 4 paper-trading gate.
criteria.evidence: paper trading ready: rule=macro.central_bank.soft.001, snapshots=2, mean_net_alpha_after_cost=0.0055, monitor_state=production

criteria.description: Claim extraction gold set passes the manual precision gate.
criteria.evidence: gold-set review records present: 50 documents / 500 claims

criteria.description: Data availability matrix covers the production candidate proxies.
criteria.evidence: 2 rule-pack proxies PIT/validation/production eligible across 1 candidate rule(s): pboc_net_injection_7d, risk_appetite_proxy

criteria.description: Validation v2 report includes effective N, overlap, FDR, costs, CI, and DSR.
Runtime aggregation implements de-duplication and conflict objects.
criteria.evidence: runtime checker accepted aggregation summary; target=risk_appetite, horizon=20, groups=1, delta=0.05

criteria.description: Confidence policy v1 uses the conservative min-components function.
Research-only no-trade rule is enforced by checker.
Patch validator rejects forbidden paths and mismatched target paths.
criteria.evidence: PATCH-CB-20260605-0001 target_path replay accepted; old=7, new=10, promotion_state=paper_trading

criteria.description: Paper trading monitor outputs live-vs-baseline deltas.
criteria.evidence: paper summary recomputed from 2 snapshot(s): delta=0.035, net_alpha_after_cost=0.0055, turnover=0.075, calibration=0.025

criteria.description: Production monitor can detect alpha decay and calibration drift.
criteria.evidence: 6 diagnostic scenarios + 5 rollback readiness checks accepted

criteria.blocker: source license review still pending or restricted
criteria.description: Compliance gate blocks unauthorized reports from production runtime.
criteria.evidence: 0 / 9812 sources approved for production runtime; 9783 Tushare source texts checked for long-passage exposure

criteria.description: Audit viewer trace covers source to agent output.
criteria.evidence: 8 audit node types and 12 source-to-output chain edges resolved
